title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Lenovo India Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Lenovo India Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Lenovo India Capital India in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Lenovo India Capital India:
Lenovo India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenovo India Capital India!
